---
title: "Teaching Materials & Tools"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: false
---

***

### AI-Augmented Analytics Guide 🤖

**📋 [Guide](teach/ai-workflow/)** - Step-by-step methodology for integrating AI tools into analytical practice

***

### Getting a U.S. Census Bureau API Key 🔑

**📋 [Tutorial](teach/census-api-key/)** - Step-by-step guide to requesting and activating a Census Data API key for student projects

***

### Analytics Concept Review 📚

**🃏 [Interactive Flip Cards](teach/analytics_review/flashcards.html)** - 60+ analytics concepts for study practice

***
